facts.setting: Emma completed the button sequence exactly.
criticalEvents: Emma completed the button sequence exactly.
On the tenth floor, the doors opened onto a city with no lights and a red sky.
Emma Shaw was a graduate student testing an urban legend for a podcast when the story began in a nearly empty twenty-storey apartment tower.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: Emma completed the button sequence exactly.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Emma Shaw defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
